intended_use: The Belun Sleep System BLS-100 is a wearable device intended to record, analyze, display, export, and store biophysical parameters to aid in evaluating moderate to severe sleep-related breathing disor
intended_use_full: The Belun Sleep System BLS-100 is a wearable device intended to record, analyze, display, export, and store biophysical parameters to aid in evaluating moderate to severe sleep-related breathing disorders of adult patients suspected of sleep apnea. The device is intended for use in clinical and home settings under the direction of a Healthcare Professional (HCP).
target_condition: moderate to severe sleep-related breathing disorders, obstructive sleep apnea (OSA)
ground_truth: Overnight polysomnography (PSG) study with manual scoring by trained sleep technician and board-certified sleep physician according to American Academy of Sleep Medicine (AASM) scoring guidelines version 2.4
other_metrics: Sleep staging sensitivity: Wake 0.604, REM 0.712, NREM 0.904; Sleep staging specificity: Wake 0.961, REM 0.944, NREM 0.695; Mean difference in total sleep time (bTST vs PSG-TST): 21.8 minutes (SD 41.6); Mean absolute difference: 30.8 minutes
